dataRow.loadTooltip: Enter comma-separated numbers and click to load
dataRow.resetTooltip: Clear all data and restore to initial state
dataRow.randomTooltip: Generate a random set of data
dataRow.randomCountTooltip: Set the number of random items to generate
dataRow.randomCountTooltipMax: Set the number of random items to generate (Max: {{max}})
dataRow.loadLimitWarning: Input exceeds the limit of {{max}} items. Only the first {{max}} items will be loaded.
dataRow.loadValueRangeWarning: Some values are out of range [{{min}}, {{max}}] and will be skipped.

graphModal.title: Custom Graph Data
graphModal.unweightedLabel:
Edges (Format: Source Target)
Node IDs (0 ~ N-1)
graphModal.weightedLabel:
Edges (Format: Source Target Weight)
Node IDs (0 ~ N-1)
graphModal.invalidNodeCount: Please enter a valid node count
graphModal.unweightedFormatError:
Format error: Each edge must contain source and target (Format: Source Target)
Error line: {{line}}
graphModal.integerError:
Source and target must be integers
Error line: {{line}}
graphModal.weightedFormatError:
Format error: Each edge must contain source, target, and weight (Format: Source Target Weight)
Error line: {{line}}
graphModal.weightIntegerError:
Weight must be an integer. '{{val}}' is not valid.
Error line: {{line}}
graphModal.negativeWeightError: Negative weights are not supported. Please enter a weight ≥ 0!
graphModal.outOfRangeError:
The following edges have node IDs out of range (Valid range: 0 ~ {{count}}). Please fix and reload:
{{lines}}

gridModal.title: Input Maze Data (0=Path, 1=Wall)
gridModal.invalidCellWarning: Row {{row}} contains an invalid value '{{cell}}'. Cells must be 0 (Path) or 1 (Wall).
gridModal.columnMismatchWarning: Row {{row}} has {{cols}} columns, which does not match Row 1 ({{firstCols}} columns). All rows must have the same number of columns.
gridModal.minSizeWarning: Maze requires at least 1 row and 1 column
gridModal.maxSizeWarning: Maze size {{rows}}×{{cols}} = {{total}} cells exceeds the limit of 400 cells (Recommended max 20×20).

knapsackModal.title: Custom Knapsack Items
knapsackModal.inputLabel: Item List (Format: Weight Value, one item per line)
knapsackModal.formatError: Format error! Ensure each line has a weight and a value (e.g., 3 20)
knapsackModal.positiveError: Weight and value must be greater than 0
